form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 4 length fourth (26.34) over 460m at Warragul. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 4 length fourth (26.34) over 460m at Warragul. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 16.75 over 300m at this track. Boasts a course and distance PB in a lightning 16.46. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 16.75 over 300m at this track. Boasts a course and distance PB in a lightning 16.46. Top chance.

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he was an impressive winner scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 4/5 at this track and clocking a slick 16.77 over the 300m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he was an impressive winner scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 4/5 at this track and clocking a slick 16.77 over the 300m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 12 over 300m at this track behind Find The Sun beaten 3.5 lengths (16.91) in a Grade 5 H. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 12 over 300m at this track behind Find The Sun beaten 3.5 lengths (16.91) in a Grade 5 H. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 31 length seventh (31.49) at Sandown. Previous form sound including a win three back at The Meadows. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 31 length seventh (31.49) at Sandown. Previous form sound including a win three back at The Meadows. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 350m. Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 H on April 12 over 300m at this track behind High End Cash beaten 1.75 lengths (16.99). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 350m. Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 H on April 12 over 300m at this track behind High End Cash beaten 1.75 lengths (16.99). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2.75 lengths at this track over 350m (19.74) beating Rupee Action in Grade 5 on April 17. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 2.75 lengths at this track over 350m (19.74) beating Rupee Action in Grade 5 on April 17. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but had to settle for a minor placing when a 1.5 lengths third over 300m at this track, clocking 16.76. Has run hot time here with a 16.46 PB at the distance. Must include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but had to settle for a minor placing when a 1.5 lengths third over 300m at this track, clocking 16.76. Has run hot time here with a 16.46 PB at the distance. Must include.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning out of back straight.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (23.05) in a GR 5 at Warragul and returns after a six months break. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Tough line-up and place prospects appear best.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 300m at this track. Prefer to watch at this stage.
